instruction: Change the rotation direction from left to right. A right rotation by `k` positions moves the last `k` elements to the front. For example, `rotate_list([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], 2)` must return `[4, 5, 1, 2, 3]` instead of `[3, 4, 5, 1, 2]`. `k` is taken modulo `len(items)` so any integer is valid. Returns a copy of items when `k` is 0 (after mod) or items is empty.
